name: hummingbird-monorepo
description: Hummingbird Design System — the publishable component/CSS package plus its living documentation site.

scripts.dev: bun run build:pkg && bun run --filter ./apps/web dev
scripts.build: bun run build:pkg && bun run --filter ./apps/web build
scripts.build:pages: bun run build:pkg && bun run --filter ./apps/web build:pages
